phone.title: Phone/SMS login
phone.description: Log in with the same phone number you use in the Deepal app. Choose your country/region, then enter the local number without the international prefix. For UK numbers, include the leading 0, for example 079... For Portugal, enter the 9-digit number, for example 912345678.

sms.title: Enter SMS code
sms.description: Enter the verification code sent by Changan/Deepal. The code can expire quickly, so request a new one if it is rejected.

commands.title: Remote commands
commands.description: Remote commands let Home Assistant control things like climate, charging, locks, and windows. Leave them disabled if you only want read-only vehicle data. The control PIN is the same PIN used for remote controls in the Deepal app.

error.send_code_failed: Could not request an SMS code. Check the phone number and country/region.
error.login_failed: Login failed. Check the SMS code and phone number format.
error.bad_sms_code: The SMS code was rejected or expired. Request a new code and try again.
error.too_many_codes: Too many verification attempts. Wait a while before requesting another code.
error.no_vehicles: Login succeeded, but no vehicles were returned.
error.wrong_account: Login succeeded, but this account did not return the vehicle already configured in Home Assistant.
error.pin_required: Enter your control PIN, or leave remote commands disabled.

abort.reauth_successful: Deepal is connected again. Home Assistant will resume refreshing your vehicle data.

init.title: Changan Deepal Cloud options
init.description: Tune how often Home Assistant reads cached cloud data and how often it asks the vehicle for fresh data. Remote commands require the control PIN from the Deepal app.

data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant polls the cached cloud status. This is lightweight and does not wake or actively query the car.
data_description.active_refresh_interval: How often Home Assistant sends the signed refresh command that asks the cloud/car for newer vehicle data. Only used when remote commands are enabled.
data_description.control_pin: The same PIN used for remote controls in the official Deepal app. Required when remote commands are enabled.
data_description.enable_commands: Allow Home Assistant to send signed commands such as refresh, lock, climate, charging, windows, boot, lights, and horn.

command_reauth.title: Deepal remote commands need reauthentication
command_reauth.description: Deepal accepted the account session and control PIN, but rejected the remote-command signing key. Reauthenticate the Deepal integration so Home Assistant can register a fresh command key.
